summary: The packaging-and-release-hardening phase is validated and committed on phase/packaging-and-release-hardening. The repo now emits signed macOS release zips plus JSON manifests, CI preview release artifacts, and explicit signing diagnostics; the bundle identifier is no longer a placeholder. `codesign` passes, but `spctl` still reports `not_accepted`, so notarization remains the next release blocker.
next_steps: Execute notarization-and-release-promotion so the signed macOS bundle can pass Gatekeeper assessment and support promotion.
Execute multi-surface-regression-hardening to reduce the intentional browser/native transport drift risk.
Reduce local desktop sandbox friction for localhost SSH fixtures in the dedicated remediation phase.
blockers: The macOS release artifact is signed but not notarized.
Local macOS localhost SSH fixture suites still require an unsandboxed shell for valid results.
